$comment: The service-family taxonomy — the IA spine. Filters and the Services section derive from this list (never hardcoded). visualisation + visual-identity are active now; the other three are modelled + surfaced as 'In development'. Turning one on = set active:true and add projects whose serviceFamily matches its id (no code change). accent ∈ pop palette: violet|red|lime|lilac.

families.label: Visualisation
families.blurb: Photoreal stills, motion and interactive scenes that sell a space before it exists.

families.label: Visual Identity
families.blurb: Brands with a backbone — systems, packaging and publications that travel.

families.label: Computational Design
families.blurb: Geometry that thinks for itself — parametric systems and design automation.

families.label: Immersive Experiences
families.blurb: Step inside the work — spatial, interactive and exhibition-grade environments.

families.label: Digital Fabrication
families.blurb: From file to object — prototyping, computational products and fabrication.
